title: mangifera applanata
intro: Mangifera applanata, also known as the Philippine mango or wild mango, is a species of mango tree native to the tropical forests of the Philippines and Malaysia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mangifera applanata include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues due to its high fiber content. Herbal preparations of Mangifera applanata are often made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
